About us

Who We Are

Shree Siddhi Engineering Enterprises is a Bhiwadi-based manufacturer and supplier of engineering components, industrial fabrication, and special purpose machines. We serve clients across automotive, cable, and heavy engineering industries.

Our facility is equipped with a range of precision machines — from a 125-ton power press to milling, threading, and sheet forming equipment — enabling complete in-house manufacturing without dependency on sub-contractors.

We aim to deliver what is agreed, on time. Our team works around production schedules when deadlines are tight, and quality checks are built into every stage of manufacturing — not only at final dispatch.

Our journey

Two Generations,
One Commitment

Shree Siddhi Engineering Enterprises carries forward a manufacturing tradition rooted in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan. Our foundation draws from Supreme Techno Systems, established in 2004 — a firm that built its reputation across the industrial belt of Rajasthan over two decades of consistent work.

Today, Shree Siddhi Engineering Enterprises continues that same direction — the same skilled team, the same processes, and the values that made our predecessor a trusted vendor for some of India's well-known companies.

We bring 20+ years of accumulated experience in special purpose machines, fabrication, and material handling — now channelled under a new name with renewed focus.

04

Supreme Techno Systems founded

Established in 2004 as a machine development firm in Bhiwadi. Built a steady reputation for SPMs, jigs & fixtures, and material handling across Rajasthan.

15+

Major clients onboarded

Served Hero MotoCorp, KEI Industries, Mittal Forgings, Dura-Line, and other industry names — building credibility through consistent delivery.

Now

Shree Siddhi Engineering Enterprises

A new firm carrying the same capabilities forward — with the same team, expanded infrastructure, and a sharper focus on client requirements.

Why choose us

What Sets Us Apart

We aim to be a vendor you can rely on — not just for the first order, but consistently over time.

⚙

In-house manufacturing

Every component is designed, machined, and finished under one roof. No sub-contracting means consistent quality accountability.

⏰

On-time delivery

We understand production schedules matter. Our team adjusts shifts to meet committed delivery dates wherever possible.

📌

20+ years of experience

Two decades of hands-on work in SPMs, fabrication, and material handling gives our team practical depth that is difficult to replicate quickly.

📈

Competitive pricing

Our streamlined in-house process helps keep costs reasonable — we aim to offer fair rates without compromising on material or workmanship.

📊

Industry-aligned standards

Products are manufactured to set industry specifications, ensuring compatibility with requirements from automotive, cable, and engineering clients.

👥

Proven client base

Hero MotoCorp, KEI Industries, Mittal Forgings, and other established names have worked with us — and continue to.
